title: にゃんこ大戦争
subTitle: Strategy/Tower defense
desc:
The Battle Cats has achieved 110 million downloads worldwide!
A global hit! Easy to play for everyone!!
A cat battle game!!
"Cute and creepy cats" are invading Japan, the future,
and even the ends of the universe!
A chance for previous players to start again!!
◆ Simple rules! Simple battles! ◆
Tap your favorite kitty to launch it!
Make a dramatic comeback with the one-hit kill "Kitty Cannon"!
Win by taking down the enemy castle!
Even if you can't clear a stage,
you can usually find a strategy by Googling it!
◆ Enjoy at your own pace ◆
This game is just for you and your kitty!
No unknown friends!
Advance your invasion with your kitty at your own pace!
◆ Creepy, cute, and beautiful ◆
Kitties beyond your imagination appear!
Watch your kitties evolve in unexpected ways!
Be sure to check out the Cat Encyclopedia, which gives you a glimpse into the world of cats!
◆ Convenient features are being added one after another! ◆
Save your formations from stages you've already cleared
Leadership recovery item
Zombie attack notification function
Guerrilla stage notification function
Previous players are welcome!!!
An industry first!? Start the game from the completion state of Chapter 3 of the Japan Arc
The "Restart Pack" is included at the start of the game!
*The Battle Cats is free to play until the end, but some paid content is available.
Presented by PONOS
